title: SkillGenerationResult
description: Results from generating custom SKILL.md files using Context7 library documentation

generated_skills.description: SKILL.md files generated from Context7 library documentation

name.description: Skill name matching the SKILL.md frontmatter name field

description.description: One-line description of what the skill teaches

source_library.description: Library name used to query Context7

skill_content.description: Full SKILL.md content including YAML frontmatter and markdown body

target_path.description: Destination path in cto-agents repo (e.g. rex/_default/drizzle-orm/SKILL.md)

skipped_capabilities.description: Capabilities that could not be turned into skills

reason.description: Why skill generation was not possible
